title: Fix Agent Factory stuck Drafting/Generating states
summary: Added request timeouts and operation locking to prevent indefinite UI spinners when OpenClaw suggestion calls hang.
changes: Added withTimeout wrappers around OpenClaw connect/send/history in suggest route.
Added client-side fetch timeout helper for factory draft/generate requests.
Blocked concurrent draft and generate actions to avoid conflicting pending states.
risks: Long-running valid OpenClaw responses may now time out and require retry.
rollback: Remove timeout wrappers and mutual exclusion checks in AgentFactoryModal and suggest route.
